_comment: MCP server registry for GitHub Copilot CLI and VS Code.
To use: merge the 'mcpServers' entries below into your existing config.
For the Fabric Data Agent URL, create a Data Agent in Microsoft Fabric,
enable its MCP endpoint, and paste the URL into 'wwi-sales-data.url'.
See src/cli/README.md for full setup instructions.

wwi-sales-data.description: Wide World Importers sales data via Fabric Data Agent

market-data.description: SEC EDGAR financial data for real US public companies via Fabric Data Agent

researcher-agent.description: Research companies on the web — news, earnings, strategy

sharepoint-agent.description: Search and retrieve internal SharePoint documents

report-generator.description: Generate DOCX/PPTX sales reports with charts and citations

quota-estimator.description: Generate quota estimation reports as XLSX, HTML, and PDF artifacts
